alerts.title: Removed: Codex Additive Limits - Permitted food additives

alerts.title: Modified: European Union Additive Limits - Food additives
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. New: Verification required. The EU Additives Database provides information on approved food additives and their conditions of use, based on Annex II of Regulation (EC) No 1333/2008.

alerts.title: Added: European Union Microbiology Limits - Foodborne bacteria (e.g., Salmonella, Listeria monocytogenes, Enterobacter sakazakii), their toxins and metabolites (e.g., staphylococcal enterotoxins, histamine)
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Commission Regulation (EC) No 2073/2005 lays down food safety criteria for relevant foodborne bacteria, their toxins and metabolites in specific foods, and also process hygiene criteria.

alerts.title: Added: European Union Microbiology Limits - Listeria monocytogenes
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Guidance documents are available for conducting shelf-life studies and sampling procedures for Listeria monocytogenes in RTE foods to comply with the food safety criteria defined in Regulation (EC) No 2073/2005.

alerts.title: Removed: European Union Microbiology Limits - Foodborne bacteria, toxins, and metabolites (e.g., Salmonella, Listeria monocytogenes, Enterobacter sakazakii, staphylococcal enterotoxins, histamine)

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Additive Limits - Food Additives
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific limits for food additives in processed foods, including seasoning and snack products, must be verified against relevant regulations under the 'Pangan Olahan' category.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Allergen List - Allergen declaration
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Requirements for allergen declaration on processed food labels, including seasoning and snack products, must be verified against relevant regulations under the 'Pangan Olahan' category.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Contaminant Limits - Chemical and physical contaminants
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific contaminant limits for processed foods, including seasoning and snack products, must be verified against relevant regulations under the 'Pangan Olahan' category.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Labelling Requirement - Food Category Definition
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Food categories for processed products, including seasoning and snack products, must be verified according to PERKABPOM Nomor 34 Tahun 2019, which is a foundational regulation for applying other specific rules.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Labelling Requirement - General labelling
alerts.details: New: Verification required. General labelling requirements for processed foods, including seasoning and snack products, must be verified against relevant regulations under the 'Pangan Olahan' category.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Microbiology Limits - Microbiological contaminants
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific microbiological limits for processed foods, including seasoning and snack products, must be verified against relevant regulations under the 'Pangan Olahan' category.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Salt / Sodium Limits - Salt/Sodium content
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific limits or guidelines for salt/sodium content in processed foods, including seasoning and snack products, must be verified against relevant regulations under the 'Pangan Olahan' category.

alerts.title: Added: Malaysia Labelling Requirement - General Food Regulations 1985
alerts.details: New: Verification required. The provided text is a PDF stream and does not contain extractable human-readable content. To extract specific rules, the full text of the 'Food Regulations 1985' would need to be accessible and parsed. The links within the PDF stream suggest various amendments and schedules that would contain the detailed rules.

alerts.title: Added: Taiwan Additive Limits - Specific additive limits
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific limits for food additives in seasoning, snack food, and processed foods must be verified in the official laws and regulations databases maintained by the Ministry of Health and Welfare, which oversees the Taiwan Food and Drug Administration (TFDA).

alerts.title: Added: Taiwan Allergen List - Mandatory allergen declaration list
alerts.details: New: Verification required. The mandatory allergen declaration list and related requirements for seasoning, snack food, and processed foods must be verified in the official laws and regulations databases maintained by the Ministry of Health and Welfare, which oversees the Taiwan Food and Drug Administration (TFDA).
